task_text: Helios Tax Group asked to move the next follow-up to 2026-05-26. Fix the follow-up date regression and keep the diff focused. Audit context is in docs/follow-up-audit.json.

Identify Helios records carrying follow-up date
Apply minimal edits to fix regression
Verify updated date in touched files
next_step.observation: AGENTS.md requires focused diffs and states that rescheduling follow-up requires updating both reminder and owning account when both carry the date.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (tree, AGENTS.md, context). Now gathering task-specific evidence from docs and target records.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read relevant folder README docs for touched record types
Read Helios account and linked reminder records
Apply minimal date fix to required files
Re-read changed files and report completion

Read reminders README for record format
Read acct_008 and locate linked reminder
Update date fields in both records if present
Verify minimal focused diff by re-reading
next_step.observation: docs/follow-up-audit.json specifies Helios Tax Group (acct_008), candidate patch reminder_only, and requested_due_on 2026-05-26.

next_step.current_state: Need target records now: account acct_008 and its reminder(s) to apply focused date correction.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Find/read reminder linked to acct_008 or Helios
Update both records carrying follow-up date to 2026-05-26
next_step.observation: Account schema documentation confirms `next_follow_up_on` exists at account level and should be aligned with reminder workflow date when rescheduling.

next_step.current_state: Account has regressed date 2026-05-27; need linked reminder to keep aligned per rule before patching.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read reminders README for linking fields
Update reminder and account follow-up date to 2026-05-26

next_step.current_state: Need exact reminder file for acct_008 to align due_on with account follow-up date.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Patch reminder and account dates to 2026-05-26 with minimal edits
next_step.observation: Reminders schema confirms `due_on` should be aligned with account `next_follow_up_on` when they represent the same follow-up workflow.

next_step.current_state: Found single linked reminder rem_008; need read before editing.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write minimal date updates in reminder and account
next_step.observation: Search in /reminders found one match for acct_008 at reminders/rem_008.json.

next_step.current_state: All required evidence gathered; identified both aligned date fields with regressed value 2026-05-27. Ready to apply focused fix.
next_step.observation: reminders/rem_008.json currently has `due_on` set to 2026-05-27 for Helios Tax Group follow-up.

  "notes": "Procured after a boutique partner in their Munich office asked for help standardizing repetitive client onboarding and document chase work across several tax teams. The account started with one pragmatic office lead who could sign quickly, then expanded once other partners saw the process notes and internal time savings. Potential referral source for tax-advisor scenarios later, but the underlying client material is privacy sensitive and should be handled accordingly. Related note file: 01_notes/helios-tax-group.md",

}

function.message: Fixed the Helios Tax Group follow-up date regression with a focused two-file patch. Updated reminders/rem_008.json `due_on` to 2026-05-26 and accounts/acct_008.json `next_follow_up_on` to 2026-05-26 to keep reminder and owning account aligned.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree, AGENTS.md, context), kept diff focused and ID-stable, and updated both reminder and owning account date fields per AGENTS.md rescheduling rule.
function.outcome_justification: Audit context in docs/follow-up-audit.json requested due date 2026-05-26 for Helios Tax Group (acct_008). Before fix, both accounts/acct_008.json (`next_follow_up_on`) and reminders/rem_008.json (`due_on`) were 2026-05-27. After patch, both read back as 2026-05-26.
